title: BreweryLib
description: A lightweight library for Alehouse Utilities mods.
body:
BreweryLib is a lightweight, foundational library required by all mods in the Alehouse Utilities ecosystem. It serves as a central hub for shared code, common functions, and core systems, ensuring that all Alehouse mods work together seamlessly.

By providing a common API and utilities like a standardized logger, BreweryLib streamlines development for the author and guarantees greater stability and compatibility for the end-user. You must install this library for any Alehouse Utilities mods to function correctly. Think of it as the master brewery from which all other Alehouse creations tap their essential ingredients.
